title: Slovakian Pork Belly Stir Fry
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired dish featuring crispy pork belly and a rich, savory sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pork belly and cook until crispy, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the crushed dark rye and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the beef broth, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper to the skillet.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until slightly thickened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked pork belly back to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the pork is coated in the sauce.
Serve hot over rice or noodles and garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
